---
title: "CV – Cyril Benhafed"
author: Cyril Benhafed
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
params:
  lang: "en"   # default value
output:
  pagedown::html_resume:
    css: ["resume", "default-fonts", "specifics.css"]
    self_contained: true
knit: pagedown::chrome_print
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(yaml)
cv <- yaml::read_yaml("cv_content.yaml")
lang <- params$lang
```

Aside
================================================================================

![Cyril Benhafed](https://filedn.com/lv1BADwarvAYuD5Q5JTX7Kk/-%20Resources/Picture/markup_1000046689.jpg){width=80%}

`r cv$section_titles$contact[[lang]]`  {#contact}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- <i class="fa fa-envelope"></i> cyril@benhafed.com
- <i class="fa fa-map-marker"></i> Lyon, France
- <i class="fa fa-linkedin"></i> [linkedin.com/in/cyril-benhafed/](https://www.linkedin.com/in/cyril-benhafed/)
- <i class="fa fa-github"></i> [github.com/cyrilbenhafed](https://github.com/cyrilbenhafed)

`r cv$section_titles$languages[[lang]]` {#languages}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
for (l in cv$languages) {
  cat('<span style="font-weight: bold;">', l$language[[lang]], ':</span> ', l$level[[lang]], '<br>\n')
}
```

`r cv$section_titles$skills[[lang]]` {#skills}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
for (s in names(cv$skills)) {
  label <- cv$skills[[s]]$label[[lang]]
  items <- cv$skills[[s]]$items[[lang]]
  
  cat("### ", label, "\n")
  cat(paste(items, collapse = ", "), "\n\n")
}
```

`r cv$section_titles$certifications[[lang]]` {#certifications}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
for (cert in cv$certifications) {
  cert_line <- cert$name
  
  # Ajoute le statut (en cours) si présent
  if (!is.null(cert$status)) {
    cert_line <- paste0(cert_line, " ", cert$status[[lang]])
  }
  
  cat(cert_line, "<br>\n")
}
```

`r cv$section_titles$teaching[[lang]]` {#teaching}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
for (t in cv$teaching) {
  cat('<span style="font-weight: bold;">', t$type[[lang]], ':</span> ', t$details[[lang]], '<br>\n')
}
```

Main
================================================================================

Cyril Benhafed {#title}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
cat("### ", cv$title[[lang]], "\n\n")
cat(cv$summary[[lang]])
```

`r cv$section_titles$experience[[lang]]` {data-icon=suitcase}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
for (exp in cv$experience) {
  cat("### ", exp$company, "\n")
  cat(exp$role[[lang]], "\n\n")
  cat(exp$period, "\n\n")
  
  cat("\n")
  for (d in exp$details[[lang]]) {
    cat("- ", d, "\n")
  }
  cat("\n\n")
}
```

`r cv$section_titles$education[[lang]]` {data-icon=graduation-cap data-concise=true}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
for (edu in cv$education) {
  cat("### ", edu$school, "\n")
  cat(edu$degree[[lang]], "\n\n")
  cat(edu$period, "\n\n")
  
  if (!is.null(edu$details[[lang]])) {
    for (d in edu$details[[lang]]) {
      cat("- ", d, "\n")
    }
    cat("\n")
  }
}
```
